subject: Security and Privacy Guide
body: This guide covers essential security practices. Security is important for everyone. Privacy matters in today's digital world. Security and privacy go hand in hand.

subject: ProtonVPN Features
body: ProtonVPN offers secure VPN services. Our VPN protects your privacy. The VPN service is available worldwide. VPN encryption ensures your security.

subject: Multilingual Support
body: Proton services support multiple languages. 多语言支持很重要。 Le support multilingue est essentiel. Unterstützung für mehrere Sprachen.

subject: Technical Documentation
body: The API documentation is available online. API endpoints are RESTful. Documentation includes code examples. API security is a priority.

subject: Common Typos and Similar Words
body: Here are some common typos: securty, privasy, encription. Similar words: secure, security, securely. Privacy, private, privately.

subject: Руководство по безопасности
body: Безопасность важна для всех пользователей. Мы обеспечиваем конфиденциальность ваших данных. Наша система безопасности защищает вашу информацию. Безопасность и конфиденциальность идут рука об руку.
